steps.title: Isolate c by undoing the subtraction
steps.content: The equation $c - 7 = 25p + k$ shows $c$ decreased by 7. To isolate $c$, we add 7 to both sides.

steps.title: Simplify and match to a choice
steps.content: Adding 7 to both sides: $$c - 7 + 7 = 25p + k + 7$$ which simplifies to $$c = 25p + k + 7$$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
